title: NetherLavaSourceConversion
description: A simple mod to make lava in the nether act like overworld water.
body:
# NetherLavaSourceConversion

NetherLavaSourceConversion is a simple mod that allows lava to act like water only in the nether. This means that you can make infinite source pools of lava in the nether but not in the overworld.

The vanilla mojang `lavaSourceConversion` will make lava act like water EVERYWHERE. This mod makes the source conversion only work in the nether.

Make sure to leave the lavaSourceConversion gamerule off in order for this mod to work

## Requirements
- neoforge 1.21.1
